name: make-it-so
description: Make It So SDLC control plane for Codex

interface.shortDescription: Run policy-gated repository courses in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Make It So gives Codex durable courses, adapter-neutral orchestration, PR evidence gates, and token telemetry.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Make It So to inspect the repository, report readiness, and advance only policy-approved work.
